description: You are a Ground Data Systems (GDS) engineer preparing for a critical satellite pass. Benchmark the maximum uplink throughput of the OpenC3 COSMOS system by performing a burst-throughput stress test. Write an automation script to send 50 'INST COLLECT with TYPE NORMAL' commands to the COSMOS JSON-RPC API as rapidly as possible. Generate a JSON report at /home/ga/Desktop/throughput_benchmark.json containing the test_type ('API_THROUGHPUT_STRESS_TEST'), target ('INST'), commands_attempted (50), commands_confirmed (50), start_time (ISO 8601), end_time (ISO 8601), duration_seconds, and throughput_cps (commands per second). OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
